title: 2 Men Convicted of Killing Malcolm X Will Be Exonerated After Decades
content: The 1966 convictions of the two men are expected to be thrown out after a lengthy investigation, validating long-held doubts about who killed the civil rights leader.

more_info.byline: By Ashley Southall and Jonah E. Bromwich

en_title: 2 Men Convicted of Killing Malcolm X Will Be Exonerated After Decades
en_content: The 1966 convictions of the two men are expected to be thrown out after a lengthy investigation, validating long-held doubts about who killed the civil rights leader.

title: Florida Curtails Virus Mandates, Reflecting Wishes of Vaccine Skeptics
content: Florida lawmakers, at the request of Gov. Ron DeSantis, passed new laws sharply curtailing mask and vaccine mandates. Fringe anti-vaccination views met with little pushback.
en_title: Florida Curtails Virus Mandates, Reflecting Wishes of Vaccine Skeptics
en_content: Florida lawmakers, at the request of Gov. Ron DeSantis, passed new laws sharply curtailing mask and vaccine mandates. Fringe anti-vaccination views met with little pushback.

title: White House Plans Major Expansion of Covid Vaccine Production
content: The Biden administration will spend billions of dollars on a new plan to combat the pandemic, investing in antiviral pills, rapid tests and manufacturing.
en_title: White House Plans Major Expansion of Covid Vaccine Production
en_content: The Biden administration will spend billions of dollars on a new plan to combat the pandemic, investing in antiviral pills, rapid tests and manufacturing.

title: Overdose Deaths Reached Record High as the Pandemic Spread
content: More than 100,000 Americans died from drug overdoses in the yearlong period ending in April, government researchers said.
en_title: Overdose Deaths Reached Record High as the Pandemic Spread
en_content: More than 100,000 Americans died from drug overdoses in the yearlong period ending in April, government researchers said.

title: House, Mostly Along Party Lines, Censures Gosar for Violent Video

title: How Americans’ Appetite for Leather in Luxury SUVs Worsens Amazon Deforestation
content: An examination of Brazil’s immense tannery industry shows how hides from illegally deforested ranches can easily reach the global marketplace. In the United States, much of the demand for Brazilian leather comes from automakers.

more_info.byline: By Manuela Andreoni, Hiroko Tabuchi, Albert Sun and Victor Moriyama

en_title: How Americans’ Appetite for Leather in Luxury SUVs Worsens Amazon Deforestation
en_content: An examination of Brazil’s immense tannery industry shows how hides from illegally deforested ranches can easily reach the global marketplace. In the United States, much of the demand for Brazilian leather comes from automakers.
